title: <div>1) Thesis: Is it an argument?  How can it be complicated?  Are they missing
content:
1) Thesis: Is it an argument? How can it be complicated? Are they missing/forgetting something?

2) Organization of paragraphs: is the pieces building to a logical conclusion, is everything in an order that makes the most sense?

3) Quotes: Do the quotes seem to be supporting the main idea of each paragraph?
context: From document: ENC 1101/1102 Notes & Ideas — chunk 2 (chunk 2/2)
